case_title: SOLOMON BERHE VS. HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERHE, SOLOMON AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERHE, SOLOMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SOLOMON BERHE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOHN LAZAR, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERHE, SOLOMON AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET GARAGE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
